message:
fix: conformance match pattern simplification + vcr writeln clippy fix

- conformance.rs: simplify missing_equals_null_or_empty_array match
  arm by combining None|Some(Null) into a single pattern
- vcr.rs: replace write!(debug, "...\n") with writeln!(debug, "...")
  per clippy::write_with_newline

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
